patch.value: Improve observability: structured remediation, local telemetry analytics, validate --fix-hints, schema versioning
Improve observability: structured remediation, local telemetry analytics, validate --fix-hints, schema versioning
Actionable, privacy-preserving diagnostics for agents and operators

value.author: github-triage-subagent
value.text: Observability/telemetry triage 2026-06-06: latest scheduled Nightly Validation run 27055539337 succeeded across Node 20/22/24/25 plus macOS/Windows matrix. Local node scripts/release/sentry-telemetry-gate.mjs --json --telemetry-mode best-effort --max-critical 0 --max-high 0 --max-telemetry-error-rate 10 --max-telemetry-missing-error-rows 0 returned ok=true: Sentry checked with 0 critical/high issues, 14 ignored expected CLI errors, telemetry finish_error_rate_pct 1.9, and failures_without_error_code_rows 0. First attempted mode 'warn' was rejected because supported values are off, best-effort, required.
